1: Pharmacokinetics of PD98059. Rats were anesthetized
using urethane and a canula was inserted in the femoral vein.
A solution of PD98059 dissolved in 10% Tween 80 in sterile
1× DPBS at a concentration of 0.5 mg/ml (total volume 2 ml)
was administered slowly by intravenous infusion. After 5, 15,
30, 60, 180, and 360 min, blood samples were withdrawn
from rats. Major organs (liver, kidney, brain, and heart) were
collected from rats after 1 and 3 h (n = 3/time point).
